ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Unique model number of the device */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date of production */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the device's configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "uart_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each UART configuration */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the configuration belongs to */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the UART configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the configuration */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the configuration */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the configuration */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the configuration is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uart_configs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_length_selects" (
  "dls_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data length select setting */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the UART configuration the setting belongs to */,
  "dls_value" INTEGER /* Value of the data length select (e.g., 8, 9) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the data length select setting */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the setting was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the setting was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dls_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_length_selects_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES uart_configs ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisor_latch_access" (
  "dla_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each divisor latch access setting */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the UART configuration the setting belongs to */,
  "dla_value" INTEGER /* Value of the divisor latch access (e.g., 0, 1) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the divisor latch access setting */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the setting was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the setting was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dla_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_divisor_latch_access_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES uart_configs ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "break_controls" (
  "bc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each break control setting */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the UART configuration the setting belongs to */,
  "bc_value" INTEGER /* Value of the break control (e.g., 0, 1) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the break control setting */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the setting was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the setting was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_break_controls_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES uart_configs ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stick_parities" (
  "sp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stick parity setting */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the UART configuration the setting belongs to */,
  "sp_value" INTEGER /* Value of the stick parity (e.g., 0, 1) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the stick parity setting */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the setting was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the setting was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stick_parities_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES uart_configs ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "register_values" (
  "rv_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each register value */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the UART configuration the value belongs to */,
  "register_name" TEXT /* Name of the register */,
  "register_value" INTEGER /* Value of the register */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the register value was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the register value was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rv_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_register_values_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES uart_configs ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, administrator) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the UART configuration being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the configuration */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES uart_configs ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change event */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the UART configuration being changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was changed */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_changes_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_changes_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES uart_configs ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_registry" (
  "registry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device registry entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being registered */,
  "registry_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was registered */,
  "registered_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who registered the device */,
  "registration_status" TEXT /* Status of the device registration (e.g., pending, approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_registry_registered_by FOREIGN KEY ("registered_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_registry_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device setting */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the setting belongs to */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the setting was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the setting was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_settings_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "uart_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being measured */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance was measured */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics (e.g., data rate, error rate) */,
  "performance_status" TEXT /* Status of the performance (e.g., good, poor) */,
  "measured_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who measured the performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uart_performance_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uart_performance_measured_by FOREIGN KEY ("measured_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
